description:
## [1.35.0](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/compare/v1.34.0...v1.35.0) (2026-07-16)

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

* **Change package name:** Add incompatible apps, update all permissions and providers ([#1847](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/issues/1847)) ([ff5359a](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/ff5359ac6d61b7b7274a7d7ed7c06198c1ed3b7f))
* **GmsCore support:** Use custom provider package name when `Change package name` is used ([7d0d56d](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/7d0d56d0652dbfd3bb6cd5b21dc21310e2b73e68))
* **Network proxy:** Support HTTPS proxies for auxiliary requests ([#2022](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/issues/2022)) ([ee52f90](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/ee52f9033687b6022f494f9afba4e0abb1bccba1))
* preserve Gradle wrapper line endings ([06d5d82](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/06d5d825e4e2f53ffc76d4f09a28bbaa5b09175d))
* **Reddit - Hide communities shelf:** Communities shelf not being hidden on experimental versions ([#1828](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/issues/1828)) ([0f05846](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/0f0584668a38f7ba721a2eb9c4daec9c00de8466))

* **Reddit - Settings:** Morphe language does not change after restarting ([#1950](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/issues/1950)) ([fc41c27](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/fc41c2757c1c6897e314e35de3e227adede03939))
* remove duplicate YouTube app target ([130a372](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/130a372c192aeffb37c4d751651f428c4b2f2739))
* **Spoof video streams:** Change default client to 'TV' ([ce3f496](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/ce3f496f9013af2d4146dc0d0f86a629d9dd7d9d))
* **Spoof video streams:** Check setting value instead of availability for JavaScript toggles ([1d92650](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/1d926503bf9ef29d8e135786479ecef1de20adbc))
* **YouTube - Add to queue:** Allows tablet patches for versions 21.xx ([6ef2a3f](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/6ef2a3f7aadb845b0e0ec5b839773d8e68504868))
* **YouTube - Add to queue:** Prevents the flyout video id reset blocking ([93d134f](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/93d134f9df792e35f0b1e40ef933262bc40fa517))
* **YouTube - Add to queue:** Show reload options when player is minimized ([#1879](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/issues/1879)) ([95c4ecf](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/95c4ecfb4525ca0964a223fdf2c0f51a9d8d6da0))

* **YouTube - Return YouTube Dislike:** Remove RYD Shorts due to YT removing Shorts dislike and RYD API no longer providing reliable Shorts dislikes data ([#1924](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/issues/1924)) ([fcb613a](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/commit/fcb613aacb28ccd319f7211282305d0c6a912874))
